articles.title: Skier dies after fall at Sugarbush
articles.description:
Authorities say the man was found unresponsive after sliding off a trail at the Vermont resort.

The post Skier dies after fall at Sugarbush appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A skier died after falling off a trail at Sugarbush Resort in Vermont.
Authorities found the man unresponsive on March 30, 2026.
This incident raises safety concerns for Boston residents visiting ski resorts.

articles.title: As playoffs near, doubt the 2025-26 Bruins at your own risk
articles.description:
"They never give up. Never. I'm just happy for them.”

The post As playoffs near, doubt the 2025-26 Bruins at your own risk  appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins demonstrate resilience, rallying for a shootout win against Columbus Blue Jackets.
David Pastrnak and Charlie McAvoy lead the team as playoffs approach in March 2026.
Local fans express optimism as Bruins aim for a strong playoff performance this season.
